scripts.build: pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/sanitizer run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distill run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-pitfall-card run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-issue-draft run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/sink-file run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-claude-code run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/cli run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/plugin-opencode run build
scripts.test: find packages plugins -name '*.test.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | xargs node --import tsx --test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/sanitizer run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distill run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-claude-code run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/sanitizer run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-sdk run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distill run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-pitfall-card run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/distiller-issue-draft run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/sink-file run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-claude-code run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/cli run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/plugin-opencode run typecheck
